title: Tracking Employee Project Status

posts.author: kayla05110415 (Kayla Willis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I have department dashboards that I’m trying to set up and I was wondering if there was a way to show what each team member is working on.

For example, a task is assigned to a department on the parent level. In the sub-item, a team member who is available from that department then picks up the the v1 of that task and assigns themselves as the owner and changes the status to “Working On It”

I would like a way to show what each member is “working on” based on the subitem task / subitem owner.

Does that exist? I already utilize a table widget to show everything that is due that day, but was looking for a more simplified version so I don’t have two table widgets on one dashboard.

posts.author: Bree (Bree)
posts.cookedHtml: I use the Cards widget and filter by Status = Working on it. I select the relevant subitem columns in the widget settings.
